
JS LIBRARY PACKAGE SETUP INSTRUCTIONS

1. Replace marked.min.js with the actual file from:
   https://github.com/markedjs/marked

2. Replace pdf.min.js with the actual build file from:
   https://github.com/mozilla/pdf.js

3. Keep filenames exactly the same to avoid breaking imports.

You can then include them in your HTML like:

<script src="marked.min.js"></script>
<script src="pdf.min.js"></script>
